titleStmt.title: SII 15.149: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 149. (B.K. No. 192 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the prākāra of the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, Pushya-amāvāsye, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The Pushya-amāvāsyā of the said year corresponded to 1190 A.D., January 7, Sunday, and the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on Monday, the 25th of December 1189 A.D.

It registers the gift of a fixed quantity of jawar to be supplied every month for worship and offerings to the god Svayaṁbhu Amṛitēśvara by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Daṇḍina-gōva Bāchidēva. The earlier part of the record contains the description of the rājadhāni-Paṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigeṟe and its Mahājanas, the donor's family, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya[śaṁbhavē .]
śrī janmasthānavāśākaradimukhaluṭhatphēnamaṁbōdhi
muttuṁgavīcivibhrājitāṁbhōdhara samudayasa
rakṣāvidhānaṁ sogayipudu ghanadhvānameṁbhōnidhānaṁ . kaṇṭha
¨rbbāḷēndurēkhāśikhaḥ Āśliṣṭāhipatē®paṭāparikaracchannacchaṭācchāditaḥ nmaṁ gaḷapiṁgaḷāṁśuvidaṣō
gāḷabhāḷāśritaḥ dadyānmaṇḍaḷikapracaṇḍakiraṇaśrībhāskarāya śriyaṁ . kaṁ . svastisamasta
dadhināthayūthavyāvēṣṭitabhūbhuvana bhuṁbhuka va¨rṇnāyamānabhūribhujapratāpā
sāditaśatrugōtrananata rājyalakṣmīvallī naparimita mahāsatvasaṁsthāna
bāhuvī¨ryyanapratimaprabaḷatara śau¨ryanagaṇita kṣātraguṇaga
ḷayanakaḷaṁkakī¨rttikaumudīprakāśitāśēṣa dīkṣā paskṛta paracakra vikrāntadharāca
kranavanītaḷavijitaprasiddha yādavavaṁśamaṁḍana sēvuṇarājavallabha śrīmadbhilla
mēśvaraṁ ka¨rṇnāṭaviṣayalakṣmīkāntanāgi samantarasugeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpa jīvi
v® . parabhūpāḷamadāndhasindhuraghaṭāsandōhasaṁghaṭṭanōddhura siṁhaṁkali jaita
siṁhanahitakṣmāpāḷaraṁ tūḷdi bittaradiṁ beḷvalanāḍo vikṛtivyāpāramaṁ tāḷdi
nire ni¨rgguṁḍipurēśanoḷsukhasudhāsaṁtriptacētōmayaṁ Antā beḷvalanāḍa celvi
vaṭṭiṁbaṁdadiṁ tō¨rppa niścintasthānamanaggadaṇnigereyaṁ bē¨rppaṭṭiyoḷpuṭṭi vikrāntai kā¨rjjuna
maṇḍaḷika bācaṁ pettanā jaitrasiṁhaṁ tāṁ meccuguḍalke vikramadalesavā śakti sā mā
nyame . ka . Ā pattanajanada manakkā po¨rttu pudida rāgamaggaḷisire santāpaharamāge
radaṁbyāpitasitakī¨rtti bhāskaraṁ mṛdukaradiṁ . va . mattamā maṇḍaḷika bhāskarāvatāra mentenda
ḍe haracaraṇasaresijātāṁkavā nandamandākinīpavitrīkṛtalalitegātraṁ śrīmanmahāpra
gaṁ tatpriyeyenisi negaḷda dakṣiṇagauri bontāṁbikege paramapuruṣā¨rtthame mū
¨rttigoṇḍu kā¨rttikēyanavatarisidantirudiyisida mānavamarutkujaṁ dīnacintāmaṇi dāna
kānīna(ṁ)nidānīṁtana vikramādityaṁ nūtenadhanvi navīnadhanadanabhinavaśūdrakāvatā
raṁ satyarādhēyaṁ śaucagāṁgēyaṁ parākramarāmaṁ parahitajīmūtavāhanaṁ
pratyakṣakāmaṁ . sāhasa bhīmaṁ mū¨rttimukundaṁ janatānandaṁ . sāhityaniḷayaṁ para ba
ḷa viḷayaṁ . rāyadaḷavajrasannāhaṁ daṇḍina gōvaṁ nereyoḍe gaṇḍaṁ kaligaḷādityaṁ
subhaṭa cūḍāmaṇi . sujanarakṣāmaṇi . [A]vanījana sēbyaṁ . kṛtasarasakābyaṁ .
nārāyaṇaṁ . śau¨ryyaparāyaṇaṁ dēvarasena kaṭṭidalagu birudara
bhāgaladēvīmanōnayanavallabhaṁ . bhayalōbhadu¨rllabhaṁ . mattaṁ . v® . rāya
ḷēśvarara manneyava¨rggada sēve naṁṭu kaygā¨ryada nāḍu sūṟetanagantaḷavaṭṭira peṁpu pa¨rvvata prāya
nippoḍaṁ madadoḷoṁdade dēvarasaṁge rājyasandhāyakavāgi bhṛtyapadadoḷnaḍevuttamanalte bhāska
raṁ . ka . dāniye ka[¨rṇnā]nujanābhimāniye mādēvasonu sakaḷakaḷāsandhānane ba¨rmma
na tammaṁ bhūnutane bhāskarāvatāraṁ bācaṁ . v® . puṭṭida tāṇamondu posabindige tāṁ kaḍugu
jjunāgiyuṁ neṭṭane pī¨rdanaṁbudhigaḷēḷumanogguḍisi¨rdda dhātriyaṁ meṭṭi samatva maṁ pa
ḍevenaṁndughaṭōdbhavanendoḍindu bē¨rppaṭṭiye janmabhūmiyene dōṣame bhāskara nūṣme sālade
śaranidhigaṁbudoṭṭa harakā¨rmmukamaṁ muṟidikki ninda bhīkara daśakaṇṭha kundaḷa manōvade kitta
varāharōpiniṁ dharaṇiyanetti nittarasiduddhatadaityaranotti sīḷdavaṁ sari dore pāṭi pāsaṭi sa
maṁ kali bācaṇamanḍaḷēśanoḷ . va . Āntenisi negaḷda manḍaḷika bācanaṁ tanna vaṁśābhi vṛddhigaṁ baḷa
santānasamṛddhigaṁ kaḷatrānurāgakkaṁ nityasukhānubhōgakkaṁ . puṭṭida pe¨rmmegaṁ . samastajana
kū¨rmmegaṁ tannanāḷdara rājyaśrīya pe[¨rcce]gaṁ dhā¨rmmikara mecciṁgaṁ nitā¨rttha manōrathāvā
ptigaṁ śrī jayakī¨rtti kānti buddhi sāma¨rtthyasaṁprāptigaṁ . sakaḷaśāntikapauṣṭika prābhāvakkaṁ
dēvaprasāda kāruṇyabhāvakkaṁ Aihikāmutrikapadānubhavanakkaṁ . paramaiśva¨ryya lakṣmī bhava
nakkaṁ kāraṇamāgi mattaṁ . ka . Ā nāḍa rājadhānige nānāstrīpuruṣaratnarāśige dha¨rmma sthānābhivṛddhi
nīkaṁ nō¨rppaḍaṇnigeṟe sogayisuguṁ . Ā paṭṭaṇadoḷu . v® . nirutaṁ gāvuṇḍa va¨rggaṁ vinutaguṇa
gaṇāṁbōdhi bhūdēvava¨rggaṁ purava¨rggaṁ tadbhavaśrīvanitage nagaraṁ sāliga¨rnnūtna ratnābharaṇa brātaṁ samantaṁbina
maḷavacōlakṣigudyaṁnivāsaṁ piriduṁ kaṇgeḍḍamādaṁtatuḷitaviḷasatpuṇyamā¨rggaṁ triva¨rggaṁ .
mattaṁ Ivariṁ lōkada vīrava¨rggavenipoṁdākhyānamaṁ tī¨rppavol javanaṁ jakkuli par kaḍaṁgu vibhadoḷu kayyikku
va[¨rbhī]ma bhairavana baggiparaṭṭi poyva siḍilaṁ mā¨rppoyvarāḷe¨rdda siṁgamanā¨rddappu vareṁdoḍī samayasāsi¨rvva
¨rgge māṟāṁparār . mattaṁ . varavidyāgamakauśaḷa¨rbharataśāstrāḷaṁkapāra¨rmmahīdhara dhai¨ryya¨rvvinutēkavā
kyaraghaviddhvaṁsa¨rśaraṇyā¨rtthasāgararatyū¨rjjitadha¨rmmarakṣara mṛtēśasvāmipādābjabhṛṁga renal baṇnisa
lāvanuṁ neṟevanēṁ sāsi¨rvvaraṁ dhātriyoḷ . © svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa
pratāpacakrava¨rttibhillamadēvava¨rṣada mūṟaneya saumyasaṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷadamāvā
ssa sōmavāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta puṇyatithiyoḷ śrīmadrājadhā
ni paṭṭaṇavaṇnigeṟeya sakaḷakaḷāsānniddhyavamṛtaliṁgaṁ śrī svayaṁbhuvamṛtēśvaradēva
bhōgadalu [Eḍeva] rājādhyakṣa ppa cintāyakana jīvitake Aṁgaḍiyalu teṟevane
lu �ḍana kūḷa jōḷamaṁ tiṁgaḷu tiṁgaḷamāvāsyayalu dēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdya pūje vidhānakkendu śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ daṇinagōna bācidēvarasaru śrīmatriva¨rggaṁgaḷa samayaṁgaḷa sāsi¨rvvara
sannidhānadoḷu dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭarintī dēvakā¨ryyamaṁ nāḍanāḷvarasu gaḷuṁ triva¨rgagaḷuṁ
yaṁgaḷuṁ sāsi¨rvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru © Idanīyandadoḷayde rakṣisidanaṁgiṣṭā¨rttha saṁ
siddhi saṁbhavikuṁ yiṁtidanaḷidaṁge gaṁge gaye kēdāraṁkurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷu pēsede pā¨rvvaraṁ
goravaraṁ gōbindamaṁ stīyaraṁ tave kondikkida pāpameydugumavaṁ bīḷvaṁ nigōdaṁgaḷoḷ
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharaṁ ṣaṣṭhiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 15.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
